data.title: Hurricane Impacts Kirkland's Q3 Performance, Focuses On Beyond Partnership To Sparks Growth
data.description: Kirkland's Inc. reported Q3 2024 sales decline of 1.7%, beating consensus. Comparable sales decreased 3.0%, gross margin expanded, and operating loss reduced. Formed a strategic partnership and ended with 325 stores.

data.title: 'I Wonder How Young People Today … Survive' – Robert Kiyosaki Says Spending $14 On An Egg Salad Sandwich 'Was Hard To Swallow'

Newmont Sells Colorado Mine For $275 Million, Refocuses On Gold, Copper
data.description: Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM) to sell Cripple Creek & Victor operation to SSR Mining Inc for up to $275 million. Total proceeds from divestment program expected to reach $3.9 billion by Q1 2025.
